overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing a neon-lit, foggy Night City street at night. The character moves from a covered sidewalk past vending machines, crosses under a massive overpass, and continues along a green bike path lined with holographic advertisements, street vendors, and cybernetic pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines and trash

events.description: character transitions from walking to running speed
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: moving quickly along the sidewalk past scattered trash and debris toward the street intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: bright yellow and blue vending machines with illuminated displays
gray concrete pavement with scattered trash and cardboard debris
dark overhanging building structure providing cover overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a covered concrete sidewalk lined with bright yellow vending machines on the left. The character transitions from walking to running, passing scattered trash and a pedestrian walking the opposite direction, while approaching a street intersection with visible traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass with directional signage and traffic

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and steps onto street crosswalk
enters darker underpass area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street and moving through the covered underpass area

notable_agents.action: dark colored van driving past on the left side of the road

entered.detail: dark asphalt road surface with yellow striped crosswalk markings
massive concrete and steel overpass with yellow structural beams
overhead signs with white arrows pointing to WESTBROOK and JAPAN TOWN

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street marked with yellow crosswalk lines and enters a darker underpass beneath a massive concrete overpass. Directional signs for WESTBROOK and JAPAN TOWN hang overhead as a dark van passes by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated green bike path with neon signage and street vendors

events.description: turns onto green painted pedestrian and bike pathway
passes illuminated food cart with vendor on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green path passing various neon signs and a street food vendor

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at illuminated cart with large umbrella

entered.detail: distinctive green painted pathway with white dividing lines
mobile food cart with illuminated interior and large black umbrella
blue neon sign with Japanese characters reading HOテル
black metal safety railing along the right edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a distinctive green painted bike path lined with metal railings on the right. The path features a food cart vendor on the left, bright blue neon hotel signs, and holographic billboards illuminating the foggy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance stairs with cybernetic pedestrian

events.description: approaches character with glowing neon outfit sitting on stone stairs

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing a seated figure on stone stairs, observing the cybernetic character

notable_agents.action: character with white hair and glowing red cybernetic legs sitting on building stairs

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to building entrance with ornate wall carvings
figure wearing illuminated white and red outfit with glowing elements
traditional red paper lanterns hanging near building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the green path past potted trees and vending machines, approaching a building entrance with wide stone stairs. A distinctive figure with glowing red cybernetic legs and white hair sits on the stairs beneath red paper lanterns, creating a striking neon-lit tableau.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a bright sidewalk into a dark underpass and finally toward a vibrant, holographic plaza. It begins along a covered concrete sidewalk lined with yellow vending machines, where the character accelerates from a walk to a run past scattered trash and oncoming pedestrians. As the character crosses an asphalt street, the scene shifts into the shadows of a massive concrete overpass marked by directional signs for Westbrook and Japan Town. The camera then follows the character as they turn onto a green painted bike path, where the atmosphere opens up into a foggy night illuminated by blue neon hotel signs and glowing holographic billboards. Finally, the path leads past potted trees and vending machines toward a building entrance, culminating in a view of a white-haired figure with glowing red cybernetic legs sitting beneath red paper lanterns.
